title: Muscle Building - Bulking Program
description: A high-calorie, high-protein program designed to maximize muscle growth. Perfect for beginners and those starting their muscle-building journey.
overview: The bulking phase is all about consuming surplus calories to fuel muscle growth. This program combines heavy compound lifts with adequate nutrition to pack on size. Expected gains: 0.5-1 kg per week with proper training and nutrition.
goals: Build a solid foundation for future cutting phases

weekly_schedule.exercises: Barbell Bench Press (4x5), Incline Dumbbell Press (3x8), Cable Flyes (3x12), Tricep Dips (3x8), Rope Pushdowns (3x12)
Deadlifts (4x3), Barbell Rows (4x5), Lat Pulldowns (3x8), Barbell Curls (3x8), Machine Rows (3x10)
Squats (4x5), Romanian Deadlifts (3x6), Leg Press (3x8), Leg Curls (3x10), Calf Raises (4x12)
Military Press (4x5), Lateral Raises (4x12), Face Pulls (3x15), Barbell Curls (3x8), Tricep Extensions (3x10)
Incline Bench (4x6), Pendulum Squats (3x8), T-Bar Rows (3x8), Dumbbell Chest Press (3x10)

nutrition.content: 4 whole eggs + 2 slices whole wheat toast + 1 banana + 1 tbsp peanut butter
Protein shake: 50g whey protein + 50g oats + 1 banana + 240ml whole milk
250g chicken breast + 200g white rice + 150g broccoli + olive oil
300g lean beef + 250g sweet potato + 150g green beans + olive oil
200ml whole milk + 30g casein protein or cottage cheese

tips: Track your calories and macros accurately using an app like MyFitnessPal
Prioritize sleep - aim for 8+ hours per night
Progressive overload is key - aim to increase weights each week
Take photos and measurements weekly to track progress
Stay hydrated - drink at least 4 liters of water daily
Consume carbs around workout times for better performance
Don't do excessive cardio - limit to 2-3 light sessions per week
Consistency over perfection - stick to the plan even on hard days
